title: Simplebeacon EU AI Act Readiness Checklist
description: Automated technical signals for EU AI Act readiness — August 2026 deadline. Static scan only; not legal advice.

rules.title: Merge gate passes on configured severities
rules.remediation: Fix blocking findings and re-run: npx simplebeacon scan --gate

rules.title: No credential or secret patterns in scanned paths
rules.remediation: Remove secrets from the repo, rotate exposed credentials, add patterns to .gitignore

rules.title: No mock/sample JSON paths referenced from production directories
rules.remediation: Replace hardcoded *-sample.json paths with repository-audit APIs or env-based config

rules.title: High-risk AI indicators documented or absent
rules.remediation: Conduct Annex III classification review; add risk-assessment.md and conformity documentation for high-risk systems

rules.title: Article 50 transparency — AI outputs disclosed to users
rules.remediation: Add user-facing disclosure that content is AI-generated or that users interact with an AI system

rules.title: AI system documentation present when AI integrations detected
rules.remediation: Add model-card.md, technical documentation, and risk assessment artifacts under docs/ or .simplebeacon/

rules.title: Human oversight signals for high-risk AI decision paths
rules.remediation: Implement human-in-the-loop review, manual override, or appeal mechanism for automated decisions

rules.title: AI decision logging for accountability
rules.remediation: Log AI system inputs, outputs, and decision rationale for audit trails

rules.title: No critical or high npm audit vulnerabilities
rules.remediation: Run npm audit fix; upgrade transitive dependencies blocking CVEs
